sources.reference: tofu, soft; per 100 g edible portion

description.zh: 嫩豆腐为大豆磨浆、凝固后形成的高含水豆制品。与北豆腐相比含水量更高、质地更软；营养值应按具体凝固剂和配方核对。
description.en: Soft tofu is a high-moisture soy product made by coagulating soy milk. Its water content and nutrient composition vary with the coagulant and formulation.

sources.reference: bean curd sheet, fresh; per 100 g edible portion

description.zh: 豆腐皮是加热豆浆表面形成的蛋白质和脂质膜制品。名称在地区间可指鲜豆腐皮或薄豆干，购买时应以包装营养标签和含水量为准。
description.en: Tofu skin is the protein- and lipid-rich film formed on heated soy milk. The name can refer to products with different water contents, so package labels should be checked.

sources.reference: yuba, dried; per 100 g edible portion

description.zh: 腐竹是豆浆加热表面膜干燥后的豆制品，通常按干品计。复水后重量和每 100 克能量密度都会显著变化，记录时应明确干重或熟重。
description.en: Dried yuba is made from dried films formed on heated soy milk. It is normally reported as a dry product; rehydration substantially changes its weight and energy density.

sources.reference: pork ribs, raw; per 100 g edible portion

description.zh: 猪排骨来自家猪（Sus scrofa domesticus）的肋骨部位，含骨比例和可见脂肪差异较大。营养表按可食肉部分计，不等同于带骨购买重量。
description.en: Pork ribs are from the rib region of domestic pig (Sus scrofa domesticus). Bone and visible-fat proportions vary; values are for edible meat rather than purchase weight.

sources.reference: pork trotter, raw; per 100 g edible portion

description.zh: 猪蹄来自家猪（Sus scrofa domesticus）的足部，富含结缔组织，同时脂肪含量不低。骨、皮、肉比例会影响可食部和实际营养摄入。
description.en: Pork trotter is the foot of domestic pig (Sus scrofa domesticus). It contains substantial connective tissue as well as fat; edible yield varies with bone, skin, and meat proportions.

sources.reference: whole chicken egg; cooking change calculated from pan-frying method

description.zh: 煎鸡蛋由全鸡蛋经煎制派生。模型按烹饪方式统一计入吸油和失水参数；实际值受用油量、锅具和熟度影响。
description.en: Pan-fried egg is derived from whole egg. The model applies shared oil-uptake and yield parameters; actual values vary with added oil, cookware, and doneness.

recipeSteps.text: 加入玉米继续炖煮，按需要调味。

sources.reference: nutrition is resolved from listed ingredients; water and optional seasonings are not included

description.zh: 玉米排骨汤的营养由列出的排骨和玉米按用量实时求和。汤水、盐和其他未列调味料不计入总量，食用时应按实际可食量记录。
description.en: Nutrition is resolved from the listed ribs and corn. Broth, salt, and unlisted seasonings are excluded; record the actual edible portion consumed.

recipeSteps.text: 猪蹄焯水后洗净，去除浮沫。
加水和常用香辛料小火焖煮至软烂。
收汁并按实际用量加入调味料。

sources.reference: nutrition is resolved from listed pork trotter; sugar, oil, soy sauce, and aromatics are not included

description.zh: 红烧猪脚的基础营养由列出的猪蹄实时求和。糖、油、酱油和香辛料尚未列入组分，使用这些配料时应补充记录或建立完整自定义菜谱。
description.en: Base nutrition is resolved from the listed pork trotter. Sugar, oil, soy sauce, and aromatics are not yet components; add them when recording a full recipe.

sources.reference: rice, milled, raw (per 100 g edible portion)

description.zh: 生精白米（可食部每 100 g）。蒸煮后吸水约 3 倍成为米饭，营养由烹饪方式运行时派生。
description.en: Raw milled white rice (per 100 g edible portion). Absorbs about 3x water when steamed; cooked nutrition is derived at runtime.

description.zh: 蒸熟的精白米主食，主要提供碳水化合物；营养由生大米经蒸饭派生（吸水约 3 倍）。实际升糖反应受品种、米饭软硬和同餐食物影响。
description.en: Cooked polished rice is a carbohydrate-rich staple derived from raw rice via grain steaming (about 3x water uptake); glycemic response varies with variety, texture, and the accompanying meal.

description.zh: 保留麸皮和胚芽的熟糙米，膳食纤维通常高于精白米；烹调软硬会影响消化速度。
description.en: Cooked brown rice retains bran and germ and typically provides more dietary fiber than polished rice; cooking texture affects digestion.

description.zh: 压片燕麦属于全谷物，可提供可溶性膳食纤维；加糖、煮制时间和冲泡方式会改变实际能量和升糖反应。
description.en: Rolled oats are a whole grain and provide soluble fiber; added sugar and preparation affect actual energy and glycemic response.

glycemicIndex.note: boiled; variety and cooling change GI

description.zh: 煮马铃薯是富含淀粉的薯类食物；品种、熟化程度及冷却后再食用都会影响血糖反应。
description.en: Boiled potato is a starchy tuber; variety, doneness, and cooling before eating affect glycemic response.

description.zh: 生黄瓜含水量高、能量密度低，适合作为蔬菜搭配；应注意清洗和可食部分。
description.en: Raw cucumber has high water content and low energy density; use it as part of a varied vegetable intake and wash before eating.

glycemicIndex.note: proxy from raw cucumber; cultivar-specific measurement unavailable

sources.reference: raw cucumber proxy; cultivar composition varies

description.zh: 露地或地方品系黄瓜的外观和风味可能不同；营养值采用同类生黄瓜数据，品种间会有自然差异。
description.en: Field or landrace cucumber may differ in appearance and flavor; values use raw cucumber data because cultivar composition naturally varies.

description.zh: 生番茄可同时作为蔬菜或水果食用，含有类胡萝卜素等植物化学物；成熟度和加工方式会影响成分利用。
description.en: Raw tomato may be eaten as a vegetable or fruit and contains carotenoids; ripeness and processing affect nutrient availability.

description.zh: 西兰花属于十字花科蔬菜，含维生素和多种植物化学物；烹调时间会影响部分热敏营养素。
description.en: Broccoli is a cruciferous vegetable with vitamins and phytochemicals; cooking duration affects some heat-sensitive nutrients.

description.zh: 带皮鲜苹果提供水分和膳食纤维；大小、品种和可食比例不同，单个重量仅为估算。
description.en: Raw apple with peel provides water and dietary fiber; fruit size, cultivar, and edible yield vary, so per-fruit portions are estimates.

description.zh: 成熟香蕉提供碳水化合物和钾；成熟度越高，糖和淀粉的比例及升糖反应可能变化。
description.en: Ripe banana provides carbohydrate and potassium; ripeness changes the balance of sugars and starch and may alter glycemic response.

description.zh: 北豆腐以大豆为原料，是植物蛋白来源；凝固剂和含水量会使不同产品的营养值不同。
description.en: Firm tofu is a soy-based source of plant protein; coagulant choice and water content cause product-to-product variation.

description.zh: 全鸡蛋提供优质蛋白质和脂溶性营养素；烹调用油和调味会显著改变实际摄入。
description.en: Whole egg provides high-quality protein and fat-soluble nutrients; cooking oil and seasoning substantially change intake.

description.zh: 去皮熟鸡胸肉是高蛋白、低碳水的禽肉选择；数据不包含额外烹调用油或酱料。
description.en: Cooked skinless chicken breast is a high-protein, low-carbohydrate poultry option; values exclude added oil and sauces.

description.zh: 大西洋鲑是脂肪鱼，含蛋白质和不饱和脂肪；生食应符合食品安全和冷链要求。
description.en: Atlantic salmon is an oily fish with protein and unsaturated fat; raw consumption requires appropriate food-safety and cold-chain controls.

description.zh: 全脂牛奶提供蛋白质、脂肪和乳糖；包装规格不同，杯和盒的体积仅作为常见份量估算。
description.en: Whole milk provides protein, fat, and lactose; cup and carton sizes are common serving estimates and vary by package.

description.zh: 烤花生能量密度较高，含脂肪、蛋白质和膳食纤维；食用时应控制份量并留意过敏风险。
description.en: Roasted peanuts are energy-dense and provide fat, protein, and fiber; manage portions and consider allergy risk.

sources.reference: 馒头, per 100 g edible portion

sources.dataset: International Tables of Glycemic Index and Glycemic Load Values

description.zh: 馒头的数值按每 100 克可食部分整理；GI 与 GL 会因原料、成熟度和烹调方式而变化。
description.en: Values for Steamed wheat bun are curated per 100 g edible portion; GI and GL vary by ingredients, ripeness, and preparation.

description.en: Values for Lean beef are curated per 100 g edible portion; GI and GL vary by ingredients, ripeness, and preparation.

sources.dataset: International Tables of Glycemic Index and Glycemic Load Values

description.zh: 羊肉的数值按每 100 克可食部分整理；GI 与 GL 会因原料、成熟度和烹调方式而变化。
description.en: Values for Lean lamb are curated per 100 g edible portion; GI and GL vary by ingredients, ripeness, and preparation.
